decisionPoints.trigger: Soft tissues recovered with unacceptable articular step-off or instability on CT
decisionPoints.action: Proceed with definitive pilon ORIF including fibular length restoration and articular reduction

decisionPoints.trigger: Pilon fracture with severe swelling, fracture blisters, or soft-tissue compromise
decisionPoints.action: Apply staged pilon protocol with spanning external fixation and delayed definitive ORIF when skin allows
